text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for my debut!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: We've been working hard for this day together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna blast right through the
competition with these sculpted hamstrings!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
B-but... do you think I'm gonna be okay? My
muscles may be ready, but I can feel my mind
fading...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This is a debut race... I'm sure everyone is here
with their own dreams. Ugh...

Aww, I thought this was gonna happen, Ryan.
You're being way too nice.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has their own reasons for being here,
but that doesn't make yours any less important.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Your dream isn't just yours anymore...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer and I are here with you, giving our
support!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I have people spotting me no matter
what, who want me to succeed.
choice_data_list:
Now you've got it! So go out there and flex your
heart out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You know, it makes me feel better knowing
that my hard work is for others too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta do this—I have to see it through. Just
gotta be myself and make my debut!
